subject: test(security): add JWT-leakage guard + schedule-monitoring TODO
body:
Two additions from the post-lockdown wrap pass:

1. scripts/__tests__/secret-leakage.test.ts — walks src/, scripts/,
   public/, app/ and fails if any file contains a JWT-shaped token
   (`eyJ[...]{30,}.eyJ[...]{10,}`). Protects against the category of
   bug where a service-role key accidentally gets committed to
   client-side code — far worse than the spatial_ref_sys exposure
   since service_role bypasses RLS on every table.

   Verified the detector by temporarily dropping a fake JWT into
   src/_test-leak-temp.ts, running the test (fails with file+line),
   removing it, re-running (passes). Standing state: 0 findings —
   repo has no committed JWTs anywhere.

   Current baseline (as of this commit): anon key lives only in .env
   / .env.example (as it should — ANON key is meant to be public and
   bundled at build time); no service_role key anywhere in the repo;
   the only "service_role" string is an allowlist mention in the
   migration 20260421000001 header.

2. docs/TODO.md — new entry: schedule periodic runs of
   spatial-ref-sys-lockdown.test.ts in CI. The trigger-based DoS
   mitigation installed in 19ed26d could theoretically be dropped by
   a platform operation (PostGIS upgrade, table rebuild) without
   any signal. A daily cron run of this one test would catch a
   regression within ~24h. Needs SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN_CLAUDE_WEB
   as a CI secret. Becomes unnecessary once Supabase support lands
   the RLS fix (robustly preserved, no monitoring needed).

Also verified during this pass:
- RLS policies on our own tables (stations, fuel_prices, fuel_types,
  price_history): 11 policies, all as expected — public SELECT on
  active data, admin-only writes via auth.jwt() role claim, price
  history append-only via INSERT-only policy. No regressions.
- No other supabase_admin-owned writable tables in public beyond
  spatial_ref_sys (re-confirmed).

Tags: testing, security, documentation
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: db-sync
Semver: patch
title: add JWT-leakage guard + schedule-monitoring TODO
